import React, { useState } from 'react'; const PatientDashboard = ({ patient, onLogout }) => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('queue'); // Mock data - replace with actual API calls const queueData = { patientId: patient?.patientId || 'P-2023-0425', queueNumber: 4, patientsAhead: 3, estimatedTime: '11:44 PM', status: 'Waiting', queueList: [ { queueNumber: 1, patientId: 'P-2023-0421', status: 'In Consultation', time: 'Currently' }, { queueNumber: 2, patientId: 'P-2023-0422', status: 'Waiting', time: '11:24 PM' }, { queueNumber: 3, patientId: 'P-2023-0423', status: 'Waiting', time: '11:34 PM' }, { queueNumber: 4, patientId: 'P-2023-0425', status: 'Waiting', time: '11:44 PM', isYou: true }, ] }; const appointments = [ { id: 1, doctor: 'Dr. Abebe Tadesse', date: '2024-03-15', time: '10:00 AM', status: 'Confirmed' }, { id: 2, doctor: 'Dr. Marta Bekele', date: '2024-03-20', time: '2:30 PM', status: 'Pending' }, ]; return (
